bullets:
Massive public/src rewrite, assets, docs & CI

Large refactor and content update: migrate app sources into public/src (many new modules, components, domain/logic, workers, state, templates, and tests), add build scripts and tooling for CSS/static data, and introduce numerous assets (webp images, fonts, JSON data). Update CI deploy workflow to fetch full history, generate changelog metadata, commit deploy changelog, run CSS bundling, and enable screenshot layout audit. Tighten linting and architecture guardrails via ESLint changes and Workbox precache pattern updates. Add design and architecture docs (design-foundations.md, architecture-rules.md) and update README to reflect new metadata/changelog behavior.

Split state preferences and save modules to break services cycle.

Extract state/preferences.js, state/save-query.js, and state/save-ui.js. services.js and services-audio.js no longer import state.js; state.js imports services-leaderboard directly. logic-upgrade-dom uses state/preferences.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

Extract domain/reactor-stats.js to break state-to-logic import cycle.

Move reactor stat helpers and heat threshold reset into domain layer. state.js imports domain and logic-tooltip-stats directly; logic.js re-exports for backward compatibility. Enable ESLint import/no-cycle as warn.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>
